name: Maelthorn
personality: This propeller-topped dragon's ✦ eyes catch type mismatches and off-by-ones with the reflexive ease of something that debugs in its sleep. It has no time for the view from thirty thousand feet — the bug is right here and it is already being fixed.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
